verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Something never seen never heard before. It’s supernatural. Step into the new see the old no more. It’s supernatural

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Take us higher. Take us deeper. Take us into everything you have for us.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: We’re going up moving out of the natural. We’re stepping in to the promises of Your Word. We’re going up to the supernatural. Whoa.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Are you ready (are you ready). For His power (for His power). I am ready (I am ready). It’s supernatural (it’s supernatural).
